component.name: BottomNavBar
component.script:
sub init() m.tabs = [ m.top.findNode("tab0"), m.top.findNode("tab1"), m.top.findNode("tab2"), m.top.findNode("tab3") ] m.labels = [ m.top.findNode("lbl0"), m.top.findNode("lbl1"), m.top.findNode("lbl2"), m.top.findNode("lbl3") ] m.accents = [ m.top.findNode("acc0"), m.top.findNode("acc1"), m.top.findNode("acc2"), m.top.findNode("acc3") ] m.tabIds = ["sections", "actions", "pageview", "url"] m.curIdx = 1 btvHighlight(m.curIdx) end sub
sub btvHighlight(idx as Integer) i = 0 while i < m.tabs.count() if i = idx m.tabs[i].color = "0x1A004FFF" m.labels[i].color = "0xFFFFFFFF" m.accents[i].color = "0xFF00FFFF" else m.tabs[i].color = "0x080818FF" m.labels[i].color = "0x5050A0FF" m.accents[i].color = "0x00000000" end if i = i + 1 end while end sub
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if press = false then return false
if key = "left" m.curIdx = m.curIdx - 1 if m.curIdx < 0 then m.curIdx = m.tabs.count() - 1 btvHighlight(m.curIdx) m.top.focusedTab = m.tabIds[m.curIdx] return true else if key = "right" m.curIdx = m.curIdx + 1 if m.curIdx >= m.tabs.count() then m.curIdx = 0 btvHighlight(m.curIdx) m.top.focusedTab = m.tabIds[m.curIdx] return true else if key = "OK" or key = "play" m.top.selectedTab = m.tabIds[m.curIdx] return true end if return false end function
